name: Menu for Medieval Christmas Dinner
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the Merrie Crown Roast of Pork according to your preferred method.
2. Make the Savory Rice Stuffing and fill the pork roast with it.
3. Cook the Lady Apple Fruit Wreath in vermouth until tender.
4. Roll out the Duchess Potato Puffs and arrange them on a baking sheet.
5. Bake the potato puffs until crispy.
6. Steam or sauté the Herbed Green Beans.
7. Slice the Royal Toast Triangles and toast them lightly.
8. Assemble the Cran-Brandy Pudding with Golden Toffee Sauce.
9. Serve the Claret Cup alongside the pudding.
10. Enjoy the EXTRA TREAT of Ha'Penny Friendship Bread.
Note: This recipe is a selection of traditional medieval Christmas dishes. Please note that some recipes may not have been tested and are provided as suggestions.
